title: CISA KEV Catalog (educational stub — Crestline Systems)

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Missing Authentication on OT Management API
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: EdgeSentry OT management API accepts all requests without authentication — attacker can reconfigure industrial gateways
vulnerabilities.requiredAction: Implement authentication on all OT API endpoints immediately
vulnerabilities.notes: Educational stub — Crestline Systems. OT environment with known ransomware campaigns targeting IIoT.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: OS Command Injection in Admin CLI
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: EdgeSentry administrative CLI allows OS command injection via unsanitised input
vulnerabilities.requiredAction: Apply patch and restrict CLI access to authorised administrators
vulnerabilities.notes: Educational stub — Crestline Systems. Command injection in OT context enables full network compromise.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: SQL Injection in OT Data Query Interface
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: SQL injection in EdgeSentry OT data query interface allowing access to industrial process data
vulnerabilities.requiredAction: Apply patch or discontinue use in critical infrastructure
vulnerabilities.notes: Educational stub — Crestline Systems. CWE-89 in IIoT context enables OT data theft.
